demo.banner: Browsing demo data — changes aren't saved
demo.badgeDesc: You're browsing a read-only preview with pre-seeded personas. Connect your own GitHub repository to save memories, edit settings, and run background loops.
demo.toastDesc: This is a read-only preview with pre-seeded personas.

gap.minutes: {count, plural, one {# minute later} other {# minutes later}}
gap.hours: {count, plural, one {# hour later} other {# hours later}}
gap.days: {count, plural, one {# day later} other {# days later}}
gap.weeks: {count, plural, one {# week later} other {# weeks later}}
gap.months: {count, plural, one {# month later} other {# months later}}

profile.heading: Profile
profile.desc: Who the agent is assisting. Your name shows on the home screen; the rest helps the agent know you.
profile.name: Name
profile.namePlaceholder: How you'd like to be shown (e.g. your full name)
profile.addressAsPlaceholder: What the agent should call you
profile.aboutPlaceholder: Anything the agent should know about you, your work, or preferences.

config.heading: Agent behaviour
config.desc: Tune how the agent slices, recalls, and manages context. Saved to your memory repo — no redeploy needed.

sync.heading: Sync from upstream
sync.desc: Pull the latest code from the original Previously template into your repository. Your personal data (memory, tasks, sessions) is never touched.
sync.success: Synced {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}} to v{version}.
sync.failRetry: Sync failed. Check your GitHub token permissions and try again.

demo.heading: Demo Mode
demo.description: You are browsing a read-only demo with pre-seeded persona data. Connect your own GitHub repository to unlock full memory features — profile editing, persistent settings, and background loops.

memory.emptyDesc: Use Chat to create your first memory file. Ask the agent to write something to memory/.
memory.placeholderPreview: Select a file to view its content. (Content preview will load from GitHub.)

archive.emptyDesc: Session history will appear here after you chat with agents.
archive.placeholderPreview: Session content will load from GitHub when connected.

missions.emptyDesc: Use Chat to create task files in tasks/. The agent can help you track mission status.
missions.placeholderPreview: Task content will load from GitHub. (Frontmatter parsing coming soon.)
